name: BalanceTweaks
description: Configurable balance tweaks for Upload Labs: boost duration and cost, perk cost, and upgrade cost multipliers.

boost_duration_multiplier.title: Boost duration multiplier
boost_duration_multiplier.description: Multiplies how long boosts last. 2.0 = boosts last twice as long.

boost_cost_multiplier.title: Boost cost multiplier
boost_cost_multiplier.description: Multiplies the cost of boosts. 0.75 = boosts are 25% cheaper.

perk_cost_multiplier.title: Perk cost multiplier
perk_cost_multiplier.description: Multiplies the token cost of perks. 1.0 = unchanged.

upgrade_cost_multiplier.title: Upgrade cost multiplier
upgrade_cost_multiplier.description: Multiplies the base cost of upgrades. 0.9 = upgrades are 10% cheaper.
